description_long: This helmet features a futuristic, high-tech design with a robust, rounded shell primarily finished in white and dark metallic tones. The front displays a large, tinted visor with intricate circuit-like patterns and a central illuminated blue element, suggesting advanced heads-up display capabilities. The sides are equipped with reinforced, angular modules and protruding components, possibly for communication or environmental control, and are connected by thick, flexible cables. The rear of the helmet is smooth and solid, with minimal detailing except for a few small metallic fixtures and what appear to be ventilation or attachment points. The surface shows signs of wear, including scratches and scuffs, indicating practical use in urban or industrial environments. Gold accents and geometric motifs add a touch of sophistication to the otherwise utilitarian appearance.
description: A futuristic, white and dark metallic helmet with a large tinted visor, angular side modules, and blue illuminated details, showing signs of wear and advanced technology.
description_view_0: Front view highlights the large tinted visor, central blue illuminated element, and intricate circuit-like patterns.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals angular side modules, thick cables, and visible surface wear with gold accent details.
description_view_2: Rear view shows a smooth, solid white shell with minimal detailing and small metallic fixtures.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with angular modules, cables, and visible scuffs and scratches.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two small, round vents at the rear and possible venting at the side modules; no large or prominent vent openings visible.
attribute_graphic_design: Abstract circuit-like patterns on the visor, geometric motifs on the top, and gold accent details; surface shows realistic wear and scratches.
